content:
# Bronze Rewards Card Terms

## Customer Fit
The Bronze Rewards Card is Northstar Bank's entry rewards card for applicants who meet the stated income and credit profile. Use it when the customer wants a no-annual-fee rewards option and does not need an introductory balance transfer period.

Eligibility and pricing facts:
1. Minimum income: 30000.
2. Minimum credit tier: fair.
3. Annual fee: 0.
4. Purchase APR: 27.99.
5. Balance transfer intro period: 0.

## Rewards Rates
Apply the Bronze Rewards Card earn rates by purchase category only; do not substitute rates from Silver Rewards Card Terms or Gold Rewards Card Terms.

| Category | Cashback |
|---|---:|
| Everyday | 1.0 |
| Groceries | 1.5 |
| Dining | 1.0 |
| Travel | 1.0 |
| Sustainable | 1.0 |
| Crypto | 0.5 |

## Fees And Program Add-Ons
Foreign transactions carry a fee of 3.0. The Bronze Rewards Card has a Rho Bank Plus bonus of 0.0, so do not describe extra rewards uplift for that program on this card. For side-by-side comparison, see "Credit Card Fee Apr Rewards Matrix" and "Internal: Credit Card Recommendation Policy".
title: Bronze Rewards Card Terms
